phases.name: Information Gathering
phases.description: Fingerprint the application, its stack, and exposed surface.

techniques.name: Conduct Search Engine Discovery Reconnaissance for Information Leakage
techniques.description: Use search engines (Google, Bing, Shodan) to find leaked info, configs, creds.

techniques.name: Fingerprint Web Server
techniques.description: Identify server software and version via headers and error responses.

techniques.name: Review Webserver Metafiles for Information Leakage
techniques.description: Inspect robots.txt, sitemap.xml, security.txt, humans.txt, .well-known.

techniques.name: Enumerate Applications on Webserver
techniques.description: Discover vhosts, subapps, admin consoles served by the host.

techniques.name: Review Webpage Content for Information Leakage
techniques.description: Scan HTML, JS, comments for secrets, internal paths, debug info.

techniques.name: Identify Application Entry Points
techniques.description: Catalog request methods, parameters, endpoints that process user input.

techniques.name: Map Execution Paths Through Application
techniques.description: Build sitemap and route graph to direct subsequent testing.

techniques.name: Fingerprint Web Application Framework
techniques.description: Identify framework (Django, Rails, Spring, Laravel) from patterns/headers.

phases.name: Configuration and Deployment Management Testing
phases.description: Validate platform, server, and infrastructure hardening.

techniques.name: Test Network Infrastructure Configuration
techniques.description: Check firewall, LB, proxy for misconfig exposing internals.

techniques.name: Test Application Platform Configuration
techniques.description: Review server config (Apache/Nginx/IIS) for unsafe defaults.

techniques.name: Test File Extensions Handling for Sensitive Information
techniques.description: Probe .bak, .old, .swp, .git, .env, source map leaks.

techniques.name: Review Old Backup and Unreferenced Files for Sensitive Information
techniques.description: Find archive, temp, and stale files that expose secrets.

techniques.name: Enumerate Infrastructure and Application Admin Interfaces
techniques.description: Discover admin consoles, dashboards, health endpoints.

techniques.name: Test HTTP Strict Transport Security
techniques.description: Verify HSTS header, preload, includeSubDomains on TLS endpoints.

techniques.name: Test Cloud Storage
techniques.description: Probe S3, GCS, Azure buckets for public/listable misconfig.

phases.name: Identity Management Testing
phases.description: Ensure identity provisioning, roles, and lifecycle are enforced.

techniques.name: Test Role Definitions
techniques.description: Check that roles/permissions match business requirements.

techniques.name: Test User Registration Process
techniques.description: Validate registration guards (email verify, CAPTCHA, rate limit).

techniques.name: Test Account Provisioning Process
techniques.description: Review account approval/activation; ensure attacker cannot self-provision.

techniques.name: Testing for Account Enumeration and Guessable User Account
techniques.description: Look for responses leaking which usernames exist.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak or Unenforced Username Policy
techniques.description: Check username rules and collision handling.

phases.name: Authentication Testing
phases.description: Verify authentication is robust against credential and protocol attacks.

techniques.name: Testing for Credentials Transported over an Encrypted Channel
techniques.description: Ensure login endpoints and cookies are HTTPS-only.

techniques.name: Testing for Default Credentials
techniques.description: Try vendor defaults on admin and device endpoints.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak Lock Out Mechanism
techniques.description: Probe account lock/unlock behavior and bypass via header/IP rotation.

techniques.name: Testing for Bypassing Authentication Schema
techniques.description: Force browse, parameter tampering, direct object access.

techniques.name: Testing for Browser Cache Weaknesses
techniques.description: Check Cache-Control/Pragma on sensitive pages and tokens.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak Password Policy
techniques.description: Verify length, complexity, dictionary, breach-check enforcement.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak Password Change or Reset Functionalities
techniques.description: Assess reset flow: token strength, binding, account takeover risk.

techniques.name: Testing for Weaker Authentication in Alternative Channel
techniques.description: Look for mobile/API/legacy channels with weaker auth.

phases.name: Authorization Testing
phases.description: Validate that access-control decisions hold across users and resources.

techniques.name: Testing Directory Traversal File Include
techniques.description: Probe path parameters for ../ and LFI/RFI.

techniques.name: Testing for Bypassing Authorization Schema
techniques.description: Access admin/other-user resources with low-priv session.

techniques.name: Testing for Privilege Escalation
techniques.description: Probe vertical escalation via role/ID/flag tampering.

techniques.name: Testing for Insecure Direct Object References
techniques.description: Swap IDs in URLs/JSON to access other tenants' data (IDOR).

phases.name: Session Management Testing
phases.description: Verify session lifecycle, tokens, and cross-site defenses.

techniques.name: Testing for Session Management Schema
techniques.description: Inspect token generation, entropy, storage, rotation.

techniques.name: Testing for Cookies Attributes
techniques.description: Check Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite, Path, Domain, Expires flags.

techniques.name: Testing for Session Fixation
techniques.description: Force a known session ID on victim and check reuse post-login.

techniques.name: Testing for Exposed Session Variables
techniques.description: Look for tokens in URLs, logs, referrers.

techniques.name: Testing for Cross Site Request Forgery
techniques.description: Confirm CSRF tokens/SameSite block cross-origin state-change requests.

techniques.name: Testing for Logout Functionality
techniques.description: Verify tokens are invalidated server-side on logout.

techniques.name: Testing Session Timeout
techniques.description: Measure idle/absolute timeout and compare to policy.

techniques.name: Testing for Session Hijacking
techniques.description: Test resilience to token theft (binding, IP/UA anchors).

phases.name: Input Validation Testing
phases.description: Check for injection, XSS, and unsafe deserialization across input surfaces.

techniques.name: Testing for Reflected Cross Site Scripting
techniques.description: Echo user input back into responses to trigger XSS.

techniques.name: Testing for Stored Cross Site Scripting
techniques.description: Persist payloads that execute when other users view them.

techniques.name: Testing for SQL Injection
techniques.description: Probe parameters with SQL metacharacters; time/error/boolean-based.

techniques.name: Testing for LDAP Injection
techniques.description: Inject LDAP metacharacters into search filters.

techniques.name: Testing for Code Injection
techniques.description: Probe eval/exec sinks and template engines for RCE.

techniques.name: Testing for Command Injection
techniques.description: Probe shell metacharacters in parameters that feed OS commands.

techniques.name: Testing for Format String Injection
techniques.description: Probe printf-style sinks with %s/%x/%n.

techniques.name: Testing for Server-Side Request Forgery
techniques.description: Force the server to fetch attacker-controlled URLs (SSRF).

techniques.name: Testing for Mass Assignment
techniques.description: Inject unintended fields (role, is_admin) into object binding.

phases.name: Testing for Error Handling
phases.description: Look for verbose errors and stack traces leaking internals.

techniques.name: Testing for Improper Error Handling
techniques.description: Trigger errors to see stack traces, SQL errors, path disclosure.

techniques.name: Testing for Stack Traces
techniques.description: Force uncaught exceptions to reveal code paths and frameworks.

phases.name: Testing for Weak Cryptography
phases.description: Assess transport, at-rest, and application-level crypto.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak Transport Layer Security
techniques.description: Probe TLS versions, ciphers, cert, HSTS with testssl.sh/sslyze.

techniques.name: Testing for Padding Oracle
techniques.description: Test CBC endpoints for padding-oracle decryption/forgery.

techniques.name: Testing for Sensitive Information Sent via Unencrypted Channels
techniques.description: Confirm no creds/PII over HTTP, plain mail, or unauth WebSocket.

techniques.name: Testing for Weak Encryption
techniques.description: Check for MD5/SHA1, ECB, static IV, hardcoded keys.

phases.name: Business Logic Testing
phases.description: Probe workflow, rate, and state assumptions that tools miss.

techniques.name: Test Business Logic Data Validation
techniques.description: Submit values outside expected ranges (negative price, huge qty).

techniques.name: Test Ability to Forge Requests
techniques.description: Replay/modify requests that should be server-generated only.

techniques.name: Test Integrity Checks
techniques.description: Tamper hidden fields, cookies, hashes protecting state.

techniques.name: Test for Process Timing
techniques.description: Exploit race conditions (double-spend, coupon reuse).

techniques.name: Test Number of Times a Function Can Be Used Limits
techniques.description: Exceed per-user/day caps (votes, discounts, password resets).

techniques.name: Test Defenses Against Application Misuse
techniques.description: Confirm anomalous behavior triggers monitoring/throttling.

techniques.name: Test Upload of Malicious Files
techniques.description: Upload polyglots, webshells, oversize, weird MIME, path traversal names.

phases.name: Client-side Testing
phases.description: Find flaws that execute in the victim's browser.

techniques.name: Testing for DOM-Based Cross Site Scripting
techniques.description: Trace sources (URL, storage) to dangerous sinks in JS.

techniques.name: Testing for JavaScript Execution
techniques.description: Find sinks like eval, setTimeout(string), Function().

techniques.name: Testing for Client-side URL Redirect
techniques.description: Test open redirect via JS location assignment.

techniques.name: Testing Cross Origin Resource Sharing
techniques.description: Check CORS wildcards, credentials, reflected origin misconfig.

techniques.name: Testing for Clickjacking
techniques.description: Confirm X-Frame-Options / CSP frame-ancestors on sensitive views.

techniques.name: Testing for Local Storage
techniques.description: Audit localStorage/sessionStorage for tokens and PII.

techniques.name: Testing for Cross Site Script Inclusion
techniques.description: Probe JSONP and dynamic JS endpoints for XSSI leaks.

phases.name: API Testing
phases.description: Cover REST/GraphQL-specific flaws (ties to OWASP API Top 10).

techniques.name: Testing GraphQL
techniques.description: Introspection, field-level authz, batching, alias abuse, depth/complexity DoS.
